text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I've got something to say, so listen up.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I screwed up closing out the last race. It hurts to
admit it, but it's true.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This time will be different. I'm not gonna
embarrass myself like that again.
choice_data_list: Show the world you're number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I will. I'll blow you all away!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The number one spot is mine! No one's gonna
steal it from me again!
